C

CalculateFOV(ArrayList<Entity>) - Method in class org.sim.fish.Fish
Scans the world list to find which objects are close enough to be seen by this fish.

CanvasX - Static variable in class org.sim.SimManager
 
CanvasY - Static variable in class org.sim.SimManager
 
Chance(float, float) - Static method in class org.sim.RND
Returns true or false based on a customized probability scale.
CheckTransitions() - Method in class org.sim.State
Checks current environment conditions to decide if the actor should switch to another state.
Color - Variable in class org.sim.Biome
 
Consts - Class in org.sim
Configuration class that stores all global constants, configuration balance parameters, and base numbers for the simulation engine.

Copy() - Method in record class org.sim.fish.genes.Genes
Copies itself.
